targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  user_key AS "ผู้เล่น",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'START_INSTANCE_UI_CLICK') AS "จำนวนกดเริ่ม",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'START_INSTANCE_FAILED') AS "เริ่มไม่สำเร็จ",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'FLAG_SUBMIT_RESULT' AND payload::text ILIKE '%wrong%') AS "ส่งผิด",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'CHALLENGE_GIVE_UP') AS "ยอมแพ้",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'CHALLENGE_INTERACTION_ERROR') AS "interaction error",
  CASE
    WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'START_INSTANCE_UI_CLICK') >= 6 THEN 'สูง'
    WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'START_INSTANCE_UI_CLICK') >= 3 THEN 'ปานกลาง'
    ELSE 'ต่ำ'
  END AS "ระดับความผิดปกติ"
FROM events
GROUP BY user_key
ORDER BY "จำนวนกดเริ่ม" DESC, "ส่งผิด" DESC;

panels.title: ความผิดปกติ: ผู้เล่นที่กดเริ่มหรือ retry มากผิดปกติ

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  challenge_id AS "โจทย์",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'FLAG_SUBMIT_RESULT' AND payload::text ILIKE '%wrong%') AS "ส่งผิด",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'FLAG_SUBMIT_RESULT' AND (payload::text ILIKE '%submitted%' OR payload::text ILIKE '%correct%')) AS "ส่งถูก",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'CHALLENGE_GIVE_UP') AS "ยอมแพ้",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'CHALLENGE_INTERACTION_ERROR') AS "interaction error",
  CASE
    WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'FLAG_SUBMIT_RESULT' AND payload::text ILIKE '%wrong%') >= 8 THEN 'สูง'
    WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'FLAG_SUBMIT_RESULT' AND payload::text ILIKE '%wrong%') >= 4 THEN 'ปานกลาง'
    ELSE 'ต่ำ'
  END AS "ระดับความผิดปกติ"
FROM events
WHERE challenge_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY challenge_id
ORDER BY "ส่งผิด" DESC, "interaction error" DESC;

panels.title: ความผิดปกติ: โจทย์ที่มีปัญหาสูง

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  user_key AS "ผู้เล่น",
  challenge_id AS "โจทย์",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'TCP_BAD_AUTH') AS "bad auth",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'TCP_MALFORMED') AS "malformed",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'TCP_HELLO_OK') AS "hello ok",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'TCP_AUTH_ATTEMPT') AS "auth attempt",
  CASE
    WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'TCP_BAD_AUTH') >= 5 THEN 'มีแนวโน้ม brute force'
    WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'TCP_MALFORMED') >= 3 THEN 'มีแนวโน้มสับสนโปรโตคอล'
    ELSE 'ปกติ'
  END AS "สรุป"
FROM events
WHERE challenge_id = 'red_protocol_probe'
GROUP BY user_key, challenge_id
ORDER BY "bad auth" DESC, "malformed" DESC;

panels.title: ความผิดปกติ: การใช้โปรโตคอลผิดพลาด / brute force

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  user_key AS "ผู้เล่น",
  challenge_id AS "โจทย์",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'START_INSTANCE_UI_CLICK') AS "จำนวนกดเริ่ม",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'INSTANCE_READY_UI') AS "พร้อมใช้งาน",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'CHALLENGE_INTERACTION_ERROR') AS "interaction error",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'SSH_COMMAND') AS "ssh command",
  CASE
    WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'CHALLENGE_INTERACTION_ERROR') >= 2 AND COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'SSH_COMMAND') = 0 THEN 'มีปัญหาด้าน SSH ชัดเจน'
    WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'START_INSTANCE_UI_CLICK') >= 3 AND COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'SSH_COMMAND') = 0 THEN 'เริ่มซ้ำแต่ยังไม่ไปต่อ'
    ELSE 'ปกติ'
  END AS "สรุป"
FROM events
WHERE challenge_id = 'red_pivot_notes'
GROUP BY user_key, challenge_id
ORDER BY "interaction error" DESC, "จำนวนกดเริ่ม" DESC;

panels.title: ความผิดปกติ: รูปแบบล้มเหลวในโจทย์ SSH / Pivot

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  date_trunc('minute', ts) AS "time",
  event_type AS metric,
  COUNT(*) AS value
FROM events
WHERE event_type IN (
  'START_INSTANCE_UI_CLICK',
  'START_INSTANCE_FAILED',
  'CHALLENGE_INTERACTION_ERROR',
  'CHALLENGE_GIVE_UP',
  'TCP_BAD_AUTH',
  'TCP_MALFORMED'
)
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1, 2;

panels.title: เส้นเวลาเหตุการณ์ผิดปกติ

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  user_key AS "ผู้เล่น",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'HINT_UNLOCK_UI') AS "ใช้ hint",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'FLAG_SUBMIT_RESULT' AND payload::text ILIKE '%wrong%') AS "ส่งผิด",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'FLAG_SUBMIT_RESULT' AND (payload::text ILIKE '%submitted%' OR payload::text ILIKE '%correct%')) AS "ส่งถูก",
  ROUND(
    (
      COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'FLAG_SUBMIT_RESULT' AND payload::text ILIKE '%wrong%')::numeric
      /
      NULLIF(
        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'FLAG_SUBMIT_RESULT' AND (payload::text ILIKE '%wrong%' OR payload::text ILIKE '%submitted%' OR payload::text ILIKE '%correct%')),
        0
      )
    ) * 100, 2
  ) AS "อัตราส่งผิด (%)",
  CASE
    WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'HINT_UNLOCK_UI') >= 4 THEN 'พึ่งพา hint สูง'
    WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'FLAG_SUBMIT_RESULT' AND payload::text ILIKE '%wrong%') >= 4 THEN 'ความแม่นยำต่ำ'
    ELSE 'ปกติ'
  END AS "สรุป"
FROM events
WHERE challenge_id LIKE 'blue_%'
GROUP BY user_key
ORDER BY "ใช้ hint" DESC, "ส่งผิด" DESC;

panels.title: ความผิดปกติ: การพึ่ง hint และความแม่นยำต่ำฝั่ง Blue

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  user_key AS "ผู้เล่น",
  challenge_id AS "โจทย์",
  MIN(ts) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'CHALLENGE_OPEN_UI') AS "เวลาเปิดโจทย์",
  MIN(ts) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'FLAG_SUBMIT_UI') AS "เวลาส่งครั้งแรก",
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (
    MIN(ts) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'FLAG_SUBMIT_UI')
    - MIN(ts) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'CHALLENGE_OPEN_UI')
  )) AS "วินาทีก่อนส่งครั้งแรก",
  CASE
    WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (
      MIN(ts) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'FLAG_SUBMIT_UI')
      - MIN(ts) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'CHALLENGE_OPEN_UI')
    )) < 15 THEN 'เร็วผิดปกติมาก'
    WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (
      MIN(ts) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'FLAG_SUBMIT_UI')
      - MIN(ts) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'CHALLENGE_OPEN_UI')
    )) < 45 THEN 'เร็วผิดปกติ'
    ELSE 'ปกติ'
  END AS "สรุป"
FROM events
WHERE challenge_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY user_key, challenge_id
HAVING MIN(ts) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'CHALLENGE_OPEN_UI') IS NOT NULL
   AND MIN(ts) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'FLAG_SUBMIT_UI') IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY "วินาทีก่อนส่งครั้งแรก" ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 50;

panels.title: ความผิดปกติ: การส่งคำตอบเร็วผิดปกติ

title: แดชบอร์ดวิเคราะห์พฤติกรรมผิดปกติ
